ops.title: Fleet .mcp.json is cc-guides-managed; semble de-exposed for real (2026-07-17)
ops.body:
Root cause of the month-long drift: .mcp.json was never a cc-guides artifact — the Jun 20 commit 2491b10a fixed only repo-bootstrap's scaffold template (new repos), and the Jul 14 "remove everywhere" session (55f86e51) cleaned only the 3 repos its bounded question offered, then wrote a memory note overclaiming fleet-wide completion. 24 repos carried the semble MCP server for 3+ weeks with no mechanism to flag them.

The fix (cc-context session 48869672, 2026-07-17):
- cc-skills f9623cef: plugin/guides/json/mcp-base.json ({"mcpServers":{}}) + mcp-swift.json (xcodebuildmcp); repo-bootstrap scaffolds .claude/fragments/.mcp.json/ layout dirs instead of the copy-once template (manifest.py FileSpecs mirror settings.json; swift layers override the layout); render_sources gained force propagation for retrofits (cc-guides refuses to overwrite a JSON artifact its lock does not list — first render of a pre-existing .mcp.json needs --force); plugin 0.55.0.
- 38 repos wired + shipped + CI green (37 lock-bearing incl. authkit/crm/semisweet, + daily as an increment on its pre-existing adoption). Preserved servers: xcodebuildmcp (authkit, cc-present, cc-sudo, cc-vigil, room-scan), tiger (cc-sentiment). fusekit-f3 (no git) hand-cleaned.
- Residuals purged the same day: daily's enabledMcpjsonServers:["semble"] settings remnant (the only one fleet-wide), and the stale "Code Search -> semble.search" guide prose in 11 bespoke repos (span delete + cc-skills:ccx import + swaps + orphaned LSP/Grep block removal).
- Verification: deterministic file-class sweep cross-checked by an independent sonnet enumeration (luna's pass was internally inconsistent and discarded). Only sanctioned mention fleet-wide: the ccx catalog line "(semantic, semble-backed)". Regression guard: .mcp.json now sits in every lock's artifacts, so each repo's guides.yml check catches drift.
- Deferred (busy trees; task 27c8cc0): cookie-sync, write-like-me (wiring only — already semble-free), yasyf.com (wiring + prose). Memory overclaim corrected in all 17 pool-account copies.

Operational lessons: codex workspace-write sandbox denies ALL .git writes — codex edits, Claude ships; workflow wrapper subagents force-concluded mid-wait kill detached children unless the child is setsid-detached with a single-notification waiter; grep gates need ensemble/assemble word-boundary tolerance; a recovery contract list must be diffed against the original roster (semisweet silently fell out and only the lock sweep caught it).
